ul.li: Usage: Status messages and simple confirmations.
Binary Safety: Allows any byte sequence (including nulls).
Recursive: Elements can be any DCP type, including other arrays.
Pipelining: Used for batching commands and multi-key responses.

g.text: Fault Tolerance: Exponential Backoff with Jitter

div.p: Full Jitter Formula (AWS style) go temp := min(cap, base * 2^attempt) sleep := random(0, temp)

ul.li: Zero-Copy: Bulk strings should use sendfile or mmap where possible for data > 64KB.
Memory Alignment: Aligned to 64-byte cache lines to prevent false sharing in multi-threaded pools.
